title: SwarmKit Fleet Register Response
description: Mode A response from serve `POST /fleet/register`: the instance creates a membership, issues the fleet a scoped credential, and returns its full state — all in one round trip. See design details/control-plane/19-fleet-enrollment-protocol.md.

membership_id.description: The membership this join created (the instance's record of the fleet).

credential.description: The scoped API key the fleet uses to call this instance (monitor or manage).

instance_state.description: The instance's full observed state at enrollment (cached by the fleet).
